unique_vulnerabilities.name: Arbitrary Ether Transfer in guess()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings describe the ability for arbitrary users to withdraw Ether from the contract, referencing the same function and overlapping lines.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Dangerous Strict Equality in guess()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings highlight the use of strict equality in the guess() function, with one emphasizing timestamp usage and the other focusing on logical correctness.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Deprecated Randomness Source
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding describes the use of a deprecated randomness source (block.blockhash and now), which is unrelated to other issues.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings describe issues with the Solidity version used, including known bugs and outdated compiler versions.
